page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.8xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-hypervised server features 32 dedicated physical cores running at a base clock speed of 2.55 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core CPU performance and multi-threaded decompression capabilities, with bzip3 multi-threaded decompression and stress-ng single-core tests scoring in the top 25%. PassMark CPU encryption and memory tests also demonstrate strong performance. However, memory write bandwidth for large blocks is relatively weak, falling into the bottom 25%, while most other memory and computational benchmarks, including Redis SET operations, static web serving, and LLM inference for 7B models, fall within the average range.

Given its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated compute resources, the ecs.c7a.8xlarge is highly cost-efficient for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local NVMe storage. It is well-suited for tasks such as multi-threaded data decompression, cryptographic processing, web serving, and moderate-scale machine learning inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 processor. It features 32 physical cores running at 2.55 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio. This KVM-based instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators but provides an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU execution, PassMark encryption, and multi-threaded decompression, though memory write bandwidth for large blocks is a notable bottleneck. With its dedicated compute allocation and balanced processing capabilities, this instance is optimized for compute-heavy workloads such as cryptography, multi-threaded decompression, web serving, and medium-scale model inference.

Equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory (2.0 GB per core) and no local storage
Strong performance in single-core processing, cryptography, and multi-threaded decompression
